business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.notes: Building or structure including completed additions, fixtures, permanently installed machinery and equipment, and personal property used to maintain or service building
Endorsement CP 04 05 (10 12) — Effective 03/15/2026. Coverage A for loss to undamaged portion of building as consequence of enforcement of ordinance or law requiring demolition
Endorsement CP 04 09 (10 12) — Effective 03/15/2026. Covers direct physical loss caused by equipment breakdown accident to mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment
Endorsement CP 04 17 (10 12) — Effective 03/15/2026. Covers direct physical loss caused by interruption of water supply, communication supply, and power supply services
Form CP 00 10 10 12. Deductible $50,000. Coinsurance shown as $90.00 in schedule. Policy Number CP-LSPH-2025-7801. Producer: Texas Commercial Insurance Partners

positives: Broad endorsement package including Ordinance or Law, Equipment Breakdown, and Utility Services — Direct Damage coverage
Substantial building limit of $222,340,000 indicating significant portfolio asset base
Business Income coverage of $59,212,000 providing continuity protection

Additional coverages included: Debris Removal (25% of loss + $25,000 supplemental), Preservation of Property (30-day coverage), Pollutant Clean Up and Removal, Increased Cost of Construction, Electronic Data
Coverage Extensions applicable including Newly Acquired or Constructed Property, Non-Owned Detached Trailers, and Property Off-Premises
concerns: High total insured value ($255,772,000 combined building and contents) requires strict coinsurance compliance to avoid penalty
Single $50,000 deductible applies per occurrence across a multi-property portfolio
Vacancy clause imposes coverage restrictions and 15% payment reduction after 60 consecutive days of vacancy
Numerous property exclusions apply including land, foundations below grade, paved surfaces, waterborne/airborne personal property, and accounts/currency
Replacement Cost optional coverage not confirmed as elected; default valuation is Actual Cash Value
Endorsements (CP 04 05, CP 04 09, CP 04 17) have a later effective date of 03/15/2026, creating a coverage gap from policy inception 07/01/2025

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Commercial Property Building and Personal Property Coverage Form (CP 00 10 10 12) issued by Apex Managing General Agency for Lone Star Property Holdings, LP. Policy Number CP-LSPH-2025-7801. Policy period 07/01/2025 to 07/01/2026. Total annual premium $403,697.14. Building limit $222,340,000; Contents limit $33,432,000; Business Income limit $59,212,000. Deductible $50,000. Produced by Texas Commercial Insurance Partners.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: SIC Code 6512 — Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas.
